entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A biotic constraint affecting pigeonpea in the Indian subcontinent, caused by a virus and transmitted by mites.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., a crop affected by Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: SMD
entities.description: Sterility Mosaic Disease, a biotic constraint in pigeonpea.

entities.name: ACERIA CAJANI
entities.description: Eriophyid mites that transmit Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: BANGALORE
entities.description: A location in India where studies on SMD resistance were conducted.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A location in India where studies on SMD resistance were conducted.

entities.name: ICP 7035
entities.description: A resistant pigeonpea genotype used in inheritance studies.

entities.name: TTB 7
entities.description: A susceptible pigeonpea genotype used in inheritance studies.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea to withstand Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The vulnerability of pigeonpea to Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Genetic factors controlling resistance to SMD.

entities.name: DOMINANCE
entities.description: A genetic phenomenon where one allele masks the expression of another.

entities.name: EPISTASIS
entities.description: Interaction between genes affecting a single trait.
